productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Girl Printed Pink Dress
description: Composition Pink printed strap dress, made of 100% cotton, has an elasticated and ruched panel on the front and back, empire waist with a bow and a flared tier at the hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Every mother loves to dress up her bundle of joy as a little princess. This dress from doodle will make your little one look like a miniature version of the princess in the fairy tales you read to put her to sleep. Pair it with pretty sandals and a cute hair-band.
